untranslatable_reason: Pattern requires visual identification of 'BARR tops' (up-sloping trend line formation after price run-up) which cannot be expressed algorithmically with available indicators. Yearly high reference requires historical context not available in indicator set. Exact trend line slope and formation geometry cannot be quantified.
translation_notes: Approximated entry using: (1) close near 52-week high via price_pos_20 > 0.9, (2) breakout above Donchian upper band as proxy for trend line breakout. Approximated exit using nearby support level (s1 pivot). Breakout timeframe set to 3 days per source. Throwback/pullback parameter (62-65%) noted but cannot be operationalized without pattern detection. Volume trend marked AUTHOR_SILENT in source, so no volume condition added.
